languages.text: "Плохой пес. Нельзя без разбору кидаться на все подряд!"
"Bad dog! Don't attack things just because you feel like it!"
languages.original_text: "Плохой пес. Нельзя без разбору кидаться на все подряд!"

traits.locale_text: "Bad dog. Don't attack things just because you feel like it!"
"Bad dog. Don't attack things just because you feel like it!"

"Bad dog! Don't attack things just because you feel like it!"
"Bad dog! Don't attack things just because you feel like it!"

languages.text: 「悪い子だ！気まぐれに攻撃するんじゃない！」
languages.original_text: "Bad dog! Don't attack things just because you feel like it!"

traits.locale_text: 「悪い子だ！気まぐれに攻撃するんじゃない！」

languages.text: "Böser Hund! Du darfst nicht einfach angreifen, nur weil dir danach ist!"
languages.original_text: "Bad dog! Don't attack things just because you feel like it!"

traits.locale_text: "Böser Hund! Du darfst nicht einfach angreifen, nur weil dir danach ist!"

languages.text: « Vilain chien ! On n'attaque pas les gens sans une bonne raison ! »
languages.original_text: "Bad dog! Don't attack things just because you feel like it!"

traits.locale_text: « Vilain chien ! On n'attaque pas les gens sans une bonne raison ! »

languages.text: «¡No, muy mal! ¡No ataques cosas solo porque te viene en gana!».
languages.original_text: "Bad dog! Don't attack things just because you feel like it!"

traits.locale_text: «¡No, muy mal! ¡No ataques cosas solo porque te viene en gana!».

languages.text: “你这只坏狗狗！不准因为不喜欢，就把东西弄坏！”
languages.original_text: "Bad dog! Don't attack things just because you feel like it!"

traits.locale_text: “你这只坏狗狗！不准因为不喜欢，就把东西弄坏！”

languages.original_text: "Bad dog! Don't attack things just because you feel like it!"
